campaign: Stan's Auto Sales - Westminster Family Car Finder
sourcePattern: CoNewsPress advertiser showcase spine with landing page, newsletter block, banner set, social copy, print/direct mail/audio handoff, production kanban, owner SMS, drip sequence, and invoice mapping.
audience: Westminster and north Denver used-car shoppers
First-time buyers comparing practical pre-owned options
Commuters looking for cars, SUVs, vans, trucks, and wagons
Local shoppers who want to call before visiting the lot
positioning: A local Westminster used-auto dealer campaign that turns inventory browsing into a simple call, visit, and test-drive path for practical Front Range vehicle shoppers.

internalOnly.note: Top 20 prospect onboarding is an operator prompt command only. Do not link these files from client, advertiser, or owner-facing campaign pages.

lastInventoryScrape.claimGuidance: Inventory, mileage, price, availability, financing, warranty, and vehicle-specific claims must be rechecked with Stan's Auto Sales before publication.

officialFacts.hours: Monday through Saturday 9:00 AM to 6:00 PM; Sunday closed.
proofPoints: Served the Westminster and surrounding Denver area since 1998
Two Time State Quality Dealer 2010 and 2018
Colorado Independent Automobile Dealers Association reference
Repeat and referral customer positioning on official site
officialFacts.claimGuidance: Verify vehicle availability, mileage, price, and financing terms before publishing any specific unit claim.

operatorSuppliedContact.usage: Campaign contact / direct sales follow-up contact. Keep separate from verified dealership main phone unless the operator approves replacing the public CTA.

artRoute: Official public web inventory assets referenced by URL; premium generated artwork not required.
